channel.title: AI News Aggregator - Full Text
channel.description: Recent AI News with Full Content

item.title: Microsoft Research (Microsoft Research)
item.description: Microsoft Research https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/ Fri, 08 May 2026 19:53:58 +0000 en-US hourly 1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 Building realistic electric transmission grid dataset at scale: a pipeline from open dataset https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/building-realistic-electric-transmission-grid-dataset-at-scale-a-pipeline-from-open-dataset/ Fri, 08 May 2026 19:53:56 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1170857 Microsoft at NSDI 2026: Advances in large-scale networked systems https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/microsoft-at-nsdi-2026-advances-in-large-scale-networked-systems/ Tue, 05 May 2026 16:00:00 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1170563 Red-teaming a network of agents: Understanding what breaks when AI agents interact at scale https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/red-teaming-a-network-of-agents-understanding-what-breaks-when-ai-agents-interact-at-scale/ Thu, 30 Apr 2026 21:53:21 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1170266 AutoAdapt: Automated domain adaptation for large language models https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/autoadapt-automated-domain-adaptation-for-large-language-models/ Wed, 22 Apr 2026 16:25:30 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1168790 Can we AI our way to a more sustainable world? https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/podcast/can-we-ai-our-way-to-a-more-sustainable-world/ Mon, 20 Apr 2026 16:24:01 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1168725 New Future of Work: AI is driving rapid change, uneven benefits https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/blog/new-future-of-work-ai-is-driving-rapid-change-uneven-benefits/ Thu, 09 Apr 2026 16:11:44 +0000 Ideas: Steering AI toward the work future we want https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/podcast/ideas-steering-ai-toward-the-work-future-we-want/ Thu, 09 Apr 2026 16:10:37 +0000 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/?p=1167876
